data.body:
## Description

Add tests that verify no references to the old DESIGN_NOTES.md path remain and the new .claude/design-notes.md path is used.

### Tests:
- test_no_old_design_notes_refs: Assert no files reference bare DESIGN_NOTES.md (excluding .claude/design-notes.md path)
- test_schema_default_updated: Assert workflow-config-schema.json uses .claude/design-notes.md default
- test_validate_config_accepts_new_path: Assert validate-config.sh accepts .claude/design-notes.md

### File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-design-notes-migration.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/scripts/test-design-notes-migration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index has entry
  Verify: grep -q 'design-notes-migration' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
